rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 21, 2017 line 1. PLAINTIFF PURE ENTERTAINMENT, LLC's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One And For Monetary Sanctions GRANTED in full. Defendant Hom has not demonstrated any good faith in trying to identify and/or produce responsive documents in the present case. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant Hom in the amount of $2,625. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Strike Plaintiffs Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 21, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANT STEPHEN HOM's MOTION To Strike Plaintiffs Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions DENIED. Plaintiff's motion to compel is not untimely as Defendant filed an anti-SLAPP motion, which carries with it a statutory stay on all discovery. Additionally, as Plaintiff's separate statement "incorporates by reference" information from within the same document, there does not appear to be any violation of CRC 3.1345, which admonishes incorporating information from outside the separate statement, without fully setting forth that information in the separate statement. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THEDA FUNG VS. SUSANA MANCIA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 21, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED. Based on the pleadings, counsels are to appear to address: 1) Plaintiff's lack of standing as an individual; and 2). Whether Plaintiff can allege in good faith her standing as an intestate heir, successor in interest, or interested person in Ivan Kim's estate. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KINSON WONG VS. JOE LING ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 21, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANT JOE LING's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR in light of the Court's ruling sustaining Defendants Thomas Wong, C.K. Kwan, Edmond Hon, and 633 Holdings, Inc.'s Demurrer to the Second Amended Complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 601 FOURTH STREET OWNERS ASSOCIATION VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 21, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANTs TUTOR PERINI CORPORATION, VALVERDE CONSTRUCTION, INC's AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED in part, and SUSTAINED in part. The Demurrer as to the First Cause of Action is OVERRULED as moot because Plaintiff filed a dismissal as to the First Cause of Action. The demurrer as to the Fourth Cause of Action for Trespass to Chattel and Fifth Cause of Action for Conversion is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to show that the trees, sidewalk, mosaic, and irrigation are personal property. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARTIN RYAN VS. 1001 CALIFORNIA STREET CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 21, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANT 1001 CALIFORNIA STREET CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED in part and SUSTAINED in part. The DEMURRER for failure to join a necessary party is SUSTAINED with leave to amend so Plaintiff can add Claire Ryan as a necessary party, per Plaintiff's agreement during the meet and confer. The Demurrer to the Fourth Cause of Action is OVERRULED. The Davis-Stirling Act allows for the additional relief of attorney's fees. The DEMURRER as to the Sixth and Seventh Causes of Action is SUSTAINED with leave to amend so Plaintiff can allege sufficient facts to state a fraud claim. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARTIN RYAN VS. 1001 CALIFORNIA STREET CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 21, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANT 1001 CALIFORNIA STREET CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend so Plaintiff can allege exemplary damages via a sufficiently alleged fraud claim. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. INA JOAN KIM ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 21, 2017 line 9. DEFENDANT INA KIM's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. A triable issue of material fact exists as to whether Defendant actually rented out the premises and received funds. See Plaintiff's Evidence, Exhibit 4. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. INA JOAN KIM ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication Against Defendant Ina Joan Kim
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 21, 2017 line 9. rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. HATEM NIGMA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication Against Defendant Alonzo S. Wilkins, Juwairiah Ahmad, And Ahmad Ansari
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 21, 2017 line 10. PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication Against Defendants Alonzo S. Wilkins, Juwairiah Ahmad, And Ahmad Ansari GRANTED. Defendants have not shown a triable issue of fact exists as to the subletting of the premises or unauthorized occupancies of Defendants Ahmad Ansari and Juwairiah Ahmad. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSE MEZA VS. RICARDO MEZA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 21, 2017 line 11. DEFENDANT RICARDO MEZA, AARON MEZA Motion To Strike DENIED. The Court may not strike portions of the notice. Defendant may move to seal the report. = (501/REQ)
